ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Build Sales Strategy for HM services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (RecordType.Name = "HM Sales Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Build Sales Strategy"))&& (ISBLANK(HM__r.Name )|| ISPICKVAL(Bid_Process__c,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: RFP Process & HM Incumbent
